title: Bone Handles
description: Allows players use use Bones as the Tool handle instead of sticks
body:
Adds **Bone Handle Tools** for:

Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe.

With **Tiers** of:

Wooden, Stone, Iron, Golden, Diamond, Netherite

 

**Supports Netherite Upgrade** Template, as well as having **its own Upgrade** Template to Convert Stick Handle Tools to Bone Handle Tools. additionally all Bone Handle Tools have their **Durability Increased by 1.33x.**
